name: Amaretto & Ghirardelli Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sour cream at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the crust: Preheat oven to 375°F. Butter a 9-inch round springform pan. Trim cardboard circle to fit inside the pan and cover with foil, leaving an overhang. Attach the side of the springform without tearing foil. Wrap foil halfway up the side. In double boiler, melt chocolate and butter until smooth. Cool mixture. Mix crumbs, nuts, and sugar in a bowl. Fold in melted chocolate mixture. Press into prepared pan, extending 1 inch up sides. Set aside.
2. Make the filling: Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each. Stir in liqueur, cornstarch, and vanilla. Fold in chocolate chips. Pour over crust and spread with spatula. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until set. Let cool for 5 minutes.
3. Make the topping: Mix sour cream, sugar, and liqueur. Spread over cheesecake. Return to oven for 5 more minutes. Cool completely on rack. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight. Remove springform side and sprinkle with almonds.
